underlying_goal: Continue implementing and fixing a Pending Settlement Tracking Feature for CASH+ delayed settlement assets, including code review fixes, event listener verification against contract ABI, and ensuring correctness of on-chain data decoding
friction_detail: Field index mapping in _read_adapter_pending_state was completely wrong compared to the actual ABI struct order, discovered during verification.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to fix code review issues and verify event listeners against contract ABI; Claude found and fixed critical index mapping bugs and completed multiple fixes across the codebase.
